gdpr.title: GDPR & Cookie Policy
gdpr.subtitle: How we manage your data and use cookies on RRDesign

sec1.title: 1. Introduction
sec1.content: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation - GDPR), this page informs you about how RRDesign collects, processes, and protects personal data, as well as the rights you have regarding this data.

sec2.title: 2. Your Rights under GDPR
sec2.p: As a client or visitor to our website, regarding the processing of your personal data, you have the following rights:
sec2.li1: Right of Access (Art. 15 GDPR): You may request confirmation of whether your data is being processed and obtain access to it.
sec2.li2: Right to Rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): You may request the correction of inaccurate personal data or completion of incomplete data.
sec2.li3: Right to Erasure / Right to be Forgotten (Art. 17 GDPR): You may request the deletion of your data from our database without undue delay.
sec2.li4: Right to Restriction of Processing (Art. 18 GDPR): You may request us to temporarily or permanently stop using your data.
sec2.li5: Right to Data Portability (Art. 20 GDPR): You may receive the data you have provided to us in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format to transfer it to another controller.
sec2.li6: Right to Object (Art. 21 GDPR): You may object to the processing of your data for direct marketing purposes.

sec3.title: 3. Cookie Policy
sec3.p: The RRDesign website uses scripts and "cookie" files to improve your browsing experience, maintain user sessions (authentication), and for anonymous statistics.
sec3.li1: Strictly Necessary Cookies: These are vital for the application to function (e.g., storing the JWT security token, maintaining login state in the Dashboard). These cannot be disabled.
sec3.li2: Preference Cookies: These maintain your display preferences on the site (e.g., selected language or accepted cookie banner).
sec3.p2: You can configure your browser to reject all cookies, but this may make certain site features (such as the client account) unavailable.

sec4.title: 4. Exercising your rights
sec4.p: To exercise any of the rights mentioned above or if you have questions about how we use your data, you can contact us at any time at the email address:
sec4.p2: We will respond to your request within a maximum of 30 days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Learn what data we process and how we keep it safe

sec1.title: 1. General Information
sec1.content: Respecting your data privacy is a priority for RRDesign. This document details how we collect, use, store, and protect the personal data you provide to us through the website

sec2.title: 2. What data do we collect?
sec2.p: We strictly limit data collection to what is necessary to provide our services or answer your requests:
sec2.li1: Contact data: Name, surname, email address, phone number (when using the contact form or sending a message on your account).
sec2.li2: Account data: When creating an account, we store an email and a secure password (hashed to a high standard).
sec2.li3: Project-related data (Client): Preferences, project requirements, and related development documentation.
sec2.li4: Technical traffic data: Simple network status tracking, such as IP address (in security logs to limit abuse / attacks).

sec3.title: 3. How do we use the collected data?
sec3.p: The collected information is used strictly for the following purposes:
sec3.li1: Conducting business relations: invoicing, quoting, managing web development projects.
sec3.li2: Authenticating clients on the platform to track the progress of their projects.
sec3.li3: Responding to requests from contact forms.
sec3.li4: Automated notifications regarding security and account/project status.

sec4.title: 4. Security of your data
sec4.p: RRDesign implements solid technological standards to protect your data from unauthorized access, leaks, or accidental destruction:
sec4.li1: Secure Connection (HTTPS/SSL): All data transmitted between the server and the browser is encrypted.
sec4.li2: Encrypted Passwords: Passwords are never stored in plain text. We use industry standards (ASP.NET Core Identity) for credential security.
sec4.li3: Interface Security (API): Protection methods like "Rate Limiting" and strict CORS policies prevent automated attacks on APIs containing your data.

sec5.title: 5. Third parties and data sharing
sec5.p: We do not sell, rent, or transfer your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes. It can only be accessed by authorized parties who directly contribute to technological functionality (e.g., Hosting platform / Email delivery services) under strict confidentiality agreements.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Rules and conditions for using the RRDesign platform

sec1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sec1.content: By accessing and using the website rrdesign.ro (and related subdomains / panels), you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions of use. If you disagree with any part of these terms, please do not use the platform.

sec2.title: 2. Services and their Use
sec2.p: RRDesign provides consulting, visual design, and web development services (website creation, dedicated apps, UI/UX). Prices or features presented on the site are informative and become contractual clauses only upon signing a physical / electronic commercial service agreement.
sec2.li1: You agree to use the platform only for legal and ethical purposes.
sec2.li2: Any attempt towards unauthorized access to the web panels (Client / Admin Dashboard) without holding legitimate rights is strictly prohibited.
sec2.li3: User accounts created for tracking projects are non-transferable. Maintaining the security of access data (passwords) is your sole responsibility.

sec3.title: 3. Intellectual Property Rights
sec3.p1: Original content on rrdesign.ro (texts, logos, portfolio images, interface graphics, front-end/back-end source code) is subject to copyright and is the exclusive intellectual property of RRDesign.
sec3.p2: You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute sections or templates found on this site without the prior written consent of RRDesign. Products / Websites developed for clients (final deliverables) become the client’s intellectual property only under the terms agreed upon in the final commercial contracts and after payment confirmation.

sec4.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
sec4.p: The site is provided "as is". We make every effort to ensure a stable and error-free platform. However, RRDesign does not assume responsibility for:
sec4.li1: Temporary interruptions caused by the external hosting server.
sec4.li2: Subtle rendering differences between various browsers, imposed by web technology updates.
sec4.li3: Indirect damages resulting from the unforeseen and temporary impossibility of viewing the project status on the personal Dashboard.

sec5.title: 5. Modification of Terms
sec5.p: We reserve the right to update or change these Terms and Conditions at any time, without prior notice, in accordance with applicable laws or new features brought to the site. Continued use of the platform implies acceptance of the new terms.

sec6.title: 6. Disputes and applicable law
sec6.p: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of Romania. Any dispute will initially be resolved amicably; if this is not possible, the dispute will head to the competent courts in Romania.
